label: Corporation
description: A legal entity that is incorporated under law, owned by shareholders, and has a legal personality separate from its owners

label: PubliclyHeldCompany
description: A corporation whose shares are listed and traded on a public stock exchange

label: FinancialInstitution
description: An organization that provides financial services, including banks, insurers, and investment managers

label: Bank
description: A financial institution licensed to receive deposits and make loans

label: Share
description: A unit of ownership in a corporation that entitles the holder to a proportion of profits and assets

label: ListedShare
description: A share that is admitted to trading on a regulated stock exchange

label: Bond
description: A debt security issued by a corporation, government, or other entity to raise capital

label: MarketCapWeightedIndex
description: An index in which each component is weighted by its market capitalisation (e.g. S&P 500)

label: RegulatoryAgency
description: A government body responsible for supervising a particular industry or market (e.g. SEC, FCA, ECB)

label: TrustInstrument
description: A legal arrangement in which assets are held by a trustee for the benefit of beneficiaries

label: ExchangeParty
description: An organisation that operates a market for trading of financial instruments

label: FinancialInstrument
description: A contract that creates a financial asset for one party and a financial liability or equity for another
